sourceRefs: DRAFT — c2.1 theme unit: virtual worlds and the digital self. The virtual-worlds lexicon (avatar, immersion, identité numérique, brouiller la frontière), the three-stage psychological process (immersion → identification → emprise), and narrative literary analysis via Madame Bovary / le bovarysme (qui raconte, qui voit, irony in the montage). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 9 'Mondes virtuels' (jeux de rôle, réseaux sociaux; 'analyser un texte littéraire narratif' with the Madame Bovary excerpt; 'expliquer un processus psychologique'). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
